hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$' && cd front && npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.py$' && cd api && uvx ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(env|env\.local)$' && echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .env files directly' && exit 1 || true
